title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 35.
content:
There was an Old Man of Marseilles,
    Whose daughters wore bottle-green veils;
    They caught several Fish,
    Which they put in a dish,
    And sent to their Pa at Marseilles.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 35."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
